name: Zenith Exports Limited
summary: Zenith Exports Limited designs, manufactures, and sells fabrics to fashion and home furnishing industries in India and internationally. The company offers a range of silk, velvet, embroidery, and weave, fabrics. It also provides industrial leather hand gloves, silk fabrics, and made-ups. The company also exports its products. Zenith Exports Limited was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
